title: Bound-check RPL SRH address count before encoding
description: Trigger: caller passes srh->num_addresses > LICHEN_RPL_MAX_HOPS to lichen_rpl_srh_write() with a large enough output buffer. lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/routing.c:119 iterates num_addresses and reads srh->addresses[i] without bounding it to the fixed array capacity. Impact: the encoder reads past srh->addresses and can leak adjacent stack/struct memory into an emitted source-routing header. Reject counts above LICHEN_RPL_MAX_HOPS before computing needed length or encoding.
close_reason: Implemented fixes in assigned subagents and ran available focused checks; full Zephyr builds remain blocked by existing workspace/module setup issues.
